sql_units.sql_text:
<select id="selectByEmail" resultType="User">
    SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = #{email}
  </select>

<select id="search" resultType="User">
    SELECT * FROM users WHERE 1=1
    <if test="name != null">
      AND name = #{name}
    </if>
    <if test="status != null">
      AND status = #{status}
    </if>
  </select>

<insert id="insert">
    INSERT INTO users (username, email) VALUES (#{username}, #{email})
  </insert>
